headline: Global Data Center Colocation Market to Reach USD 327.3 Billion by 2035, Expanding at a 14.5% CAGR: Custom Market Insights (Analysis, Outlook, Leaders, Report, Trends, Forecast, Segmentation, Growth Rate, Value, SWOT Analysis)

headline: Assessing Iron Mountain (IRM) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run
summary: Why Iron Mountain Is Drawing Fresh Attention Iron Mountain (IRM) is attracting fresh attention after a strong past 3 months, with the stock showing a 23.8% total return and a 56.5% gain year to date. See our latest analysis for Iron Mountain. At a share price of $130.25, Iron Mountain’s recent 1-day and 7-day share price returns of 1.8% and 2.7% sit against a 90-day share price return of 23.8% and a 3-year total shareholder return of 158.5%. This indicates momentum that has built over time...
